message:
feat(FJ-P2C-006-G): E2E scenario scripts for backend bridge

6 E2E scenarios: CPU backend all-primitives, backend discovery
capabilities, device routing via registry, graceful CPU fallback,
cross-backend consistency (direct vs fallback vs default routing),
and buffer round-trip through allocate/transfer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
